commit_subject: [4.2.x] Refs CVE-2024-11168 -- Updated vendored _urlsplit() to properly validate IPv6 and IPvFuture addresses.
[4.2.x] Fixed CVE-2024-41989 -- Prevented excessive memory consumption in floatformat.
[4.2.x] Fixed CVE-2024-41990 -- Mitigated potential DoS in urlize and urlizetrunc template filters.
[4.2.x] Fixed CVE-2024-41991 -- Prevented potential ReDoS in django.utils.html.urlize() and AdminURLFieldWidget.
[4.2.x] Fixed CVE-2024-42005 -- Mitigated QuerySet.values() SQL injection attacks against JSON fields.
Fix signed integer overflow in jvp_array_write and jvp_object_rehash
Fixes CVE-2025-49014 which was introduced in 1.8.0
Fix GHSA-f946-j5j2-4w5m stack-overflow by limit regex parse depth
chore: fix some typos in comments (#3096)
Fix client arbitrary file access during archive extraction zipslip
Neutralize zip file traversal attacks in miniunz.
